raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Californians long for the days of Governors such as George Deukmejian and Pete Wilson, who opposed the release of sexually violent predators into residential neighborhoods.",
    "Liberty Healthcare is described as a front group for the Newsom Administration.",
    "The release of child predator Michael Martinez into Borrego Springs was protested by Senator Jones.",
    "Previous judges have blocked Douglas Badger from living in proposed homes in Borrego Springs and Mt. Helix.",
    "Former Governors Pete Wilson and George Deukmejian ordered dangerous parolees to be housed in trailers at state correctional facilities.",
